text.content: MAXAM Showcases its Performance Solutions at Farm Progress

rich_text.plain_text: MAXAM Showcases its Performance Solutions at Farm Progress

text.content: Join MAXAM at the Nation's Largest Outdoor Farm Event at Booth #VIT9234

rich_text.plain_text: Join MAXAM at the Nation's Largest Outdoor Farm Event at Booth #VIT9234

text.content: [Danvers, Massachusetts, July 27, 2021] MAXAM Tire North America will be setting the stage at Farm Progress 2021, showcasing their all-new products in Decatur, IL, August 31 - September 2nd in the Varied Industries Tent, booth #VIT9234. Visitors will be able to view MAXAM’s broad range of value-performance agricultural tires, along with the all-new range of radial compact tires for farm support equipment.

rich_text.plain_text: [Danvers, Massachusetts, July 27, 2021] MAXAM Tire North America will be setting the stage at Farm Progress 2021, showcasing their all-new products in Decatur, IL, August 31 - September 2nd in the Varied Industries Tent, booth #VIT9234. Visitors will be able to view MAXAM’s broad range of value-performance agricultural tires, along with the all-new range of radial compact tires for farm support equipment.

text.content: As a rapidly growing global organization, MAXAM Tire has built a strong reputation in the off-the-road and specialty tire market by offering products with both leading-edge quality and performance reliability that deliver exceptional value. This foundation has fueled MAXAM’s agricultural expansion, broadening its product series and achieving significant year-over-year growth. MAXAM is continuously enhancing its radial agricultural program to provide superior business solutions to farmers and growers globally.

rich_text.plain_text: As a rapidly growing global organization, MAXAM Tire has built a strong reputation in the off-the-road and specialty tire market by offering products with both leading-edge quality and performance reliability that deliver exceptional value. This foundation has fueled MAXAM’s agricultural expansion, broadening its product series and achieving significant year-over-year growth. MAXAM is continuously enhancing its radial agricultural program to provide superior business solutions to farmers and growers globally.

text.content: “We look forward to introducing our newest agricultural series products at Farm Progress and celebrating the solutions that we have provided the industry thus far. Our radial agricultural tires are designed to deliver a simple, yet effective range of tires grouped by aspect ratio and size to meet current as well as future equipment’s evolution,” says Gregory Gilland, VP of MAXAM Global Agriculture.

rich_text.plain_text: “We look forward to introducing our newest agricultural series products at Farm Progress and celebrating the solutions that we have provided the industry thus far. Our radial agricultural tires are designed to deliver a simple, yet effective range of tires grouped by aspect ratio and size to meet current as well as future equipment’s evolution,” says Gregory Gilland, VP of MAXAM Global Agriculture.

text.content: MAXAM Tire will be featuring the AGRIXTRA series at Farm Progress. This range of agricultural tires has had several years of great success in the European market and is developing a strong name in North America as well. The AGRIXTRA 85 standard aspect ratio tires, AGRIXTRA N narrow tires, and AGRIXTRA H super volume tires will all be on display this year. Each product provides a different benefit while simultaneously guaranteeing the performance, quality, and value that MAXAM has come to represent to customers around the world.

rich_text.plain_text: MAXAM Tire will be featuring the AGRIXTRA series at Farm Progress. This range of agricultural tires has had several years of great success in the European market and is developing a strong name in North America as well. The AGRIXTRA 85 standard aspect ratio tires, AGRIXTRA N narrow tires, and AGRIXTRA H super volume tires will all be on display this year. Each product provides a different benefit while simultaneously guaranteeing the performance, quality, and value that MAXAM has come to represent to customers around the world.

text.content: The FLOTXTRA, MAXAM’s all-steel-radial flotation implement tire for agricultural tanker and trailer applications will also be on display. Recently OEM approved by JOSKIN, the FLOTXTRA features an optimized non-directional block tread pattern that provides superior field traction, exceptional lateral stability, and minimal vibration at roading speeds.

rich_text.plain_text: The FLOTXTRA, MAXAM’s all-steel-radial flotation implement tire for agricultural tanker and trailer applications will also be on display. Recently OEM approved by JOSKIN, the FLOTXTRA features an optimized non-directional block tread pattern that provides superior field traction, exceptional lateral stability, and minimal vibration at roading speeds.

text.content: Another highlight of the show will be MAXAM’s complete range of radial compact tires, a new market offering for compact equipment such as skid steers, backhoes, compact wheel loaders, telehandlers, and excavators. The need for improved performance and value has led North American farmers and growers to consider European market solutions. MAXAM has once more developed radial solutions to address the ever-changing market by creating a range of products that encompass features and benefits tailored to deliver solutions to a multipurpose environment.
